old_string: direction = 'declining' if rl2f < prev - 0.02 else ('improving' if rl2f > prev + 0.02 else 'stable')
new_string:
diff = round(rl2f - prev, 4)
direction = 'declining' if diff <= -0.02 else ('improving' if diff >= 0.02 else 'stable')
reason: IEEE 754 floating point imprecision caused cycles_since_improvement to get stuck at 110+ because 0.46+0.02=0.48000000000000004, making 0.48 > 0.48000000000000004 evaluate as False. Fix: compute diff with round(4) and use >= instead of >. Confirmed fix in cycle 498 one-time; this makes it permanent.
